title: Immediate Requirement Store Manager at Poorvika Mobiles South Asia Partners

jsonLd.title: Immediate Requirement Store Manager at Poorvika Mobiles South Asia Partners
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Poorvika Mobiles South Asia Partners! We are hiring a Store Manager for our Kochi team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Poorvika Mobiles South Asia Partners:
Poorvika Mobiles South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in SAP Retail

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Kochi, Kerala, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Poorvika Mobiles South Asia Partners!
